sobre.titulo: The platform belongs to the city
sobre.desc: São Miguel do Gostoso deserves its own guide. Vive Gostoso was built by people who know the town and live here.
sobre.banner_titulo: Every Gostoso business gets organic traffic. For free.
sobre.banner_sub: No deadlines. No hidden fees. Built by people who live here.
sobre.oque_p1: Tourism websites show what a city wants to sell. Vive Gostoso shows what the city actually is — including the small restaurant open every Monday, the guesthouse run by someone born here, the kite instructor who knows every wind.
sobre.oque_p2: The platform belongs to the city. It doesn't exist to make money for an outside investor. It exists so that tourism money stays in Gostoso, funds Gostoso, and grows Gostoso the way locals want.
sobre.step_0_body: Any business in Gostoso gets on the platform for free. Photos, hours, contact, location. No expiry date, no surprise fees.
sobre.step_1_body: Visitors to Gostoso search before they arrive. Every listed business shows up in Google results and inside the platform, without spending on ads.
sobre.step_2_title: More businesses, more reach for everyone
sobre.step_2_body: The platform gets more relevant on Google with each new business. More visitors find it before arriving in Gostoso. Growth is collective.
sobre.step_3_body: Members (R$30-50/month) fund paid traffic campaigns that promote Gostoso as a destination. The benefit isn't exclusive to who pays — the whole platform gains. 80% goes straight to the City's Public Fund.
sobre.step_4_title: The future belongs to the community
sobre.step_4_body: Symposiums, training, talks, seasonal workshops — all of this is possible when the community organizes. Vive Gostoso is the infrastructure. What gets built on top is decided by people who live and work here.
sobre.rede_h2: The more, the better for everyone.
sobre.rede_desc: Vive Gostoso works like a flywheel: each new business strengthens the whole. Nobody has to grow alone.
sobre.rede_ciclo_text: More customers attract more businesses, making the platform even stronger. Nobody has to do this alone.
sobre.verbos_desc: Each module answers a question that visitors — and locals — ask every day.
sobre.verbos_fique_desc: Guesthouses and all types of accommodation
sobre.verbos_conheca_desc: History, beaches and how to get here
sobre.planos_desc: Listing is free and already drives traffic. Paid plans are for those who want more visibility and to fund the city.
sobre.planos_assoc_item_3_text: campaigns that promote Gostoso as a destination. All members appear.
sobre.planos_plus_item_1_pre: Dedicated paid traffic: individual campaigns created and managed by
sobre.planos_disclaimer: Paid plans are optional. They exist to fund Gostoso's collective promotion, not to make a profit.
sobre.transp_stat_0: of revenue goes to the City's Public Marketing Fund
sobre.transp_stat_1: covers hosting, domain and platform maintenance
sobre.transp_stat_2: profit — the platform doesn't exist to enrich anyone outside
sobre.transp_desc: All financial activity is public on the SUPPORT page. Anyone can audit what comes in and what goes out.
sobre.futuro_h2: The future belongs to the community.
sobre.futuro_desc: The platform is the infrastructure. What the city builds on top depends on how many people decide to participate. A few real possibilities:
sobre.futuro_box: None of this requires an outside company. It takes locals and business owners deciding to do it together. The infrastructure is already here.
sobre.quem_balaio_desc: The company behind the development and maintenance of the platform. Vive Gostoso is the first case of a model designed for other towns on Brazil's northeastern coast.
sobre.cta_explorar_h2_1: Now that you understand the project,
sobre.cta_explorar_desc: Restaurants, guesthouses, tours, events — everything is on the platform. Maybe your business is already there?
sobre.participar_h2: How to get involved in Vive Gostoso
sobre.participar_negocio_desc: List it for free. Full profile with photos, hours, location and direct contact. No cost, no expiry.
sobre.participar_alcance_desc: Become a member and contribute to the city's collective promotion. 80% goes straight to the Public Fund.
sobre.participar_morador_desc: Offer your services or post job listings in the Hire module. Free and without middlemen.

apoie.desc: 100% of what we raise goes directly to maintaining and improving the platform. No mystery.
apoie.doe_desc: Any amount helps keep Vive Gostoso running.
apoie.sucesso_desc: Your donation helps keep the platform free for the whole city.
apoie.custos_desc: What it costs to keep Vive Gostoso running every month.
apoie.meta_desc: Transparent public fund to promote São Miguel do Gostoso. See how the money is used.

conheca.desc: A fishing village on the northern coast of Rio Grande do Norte. From August to January, the wind doesn't stop — kite and windsurfing season. The sunset at Praia do Minhoto turns into a photo every evening.
conheca.praias_minhoto_desc: the main beach, with restaurants, bars and kite right on the waterfront.
conheca.praias_maceio_desc: calmer beach, great for families, shallow warm waters.
conheca.praias_tourinhos_desc: favourite spot for advanced kitesurfers — constant wind and waves.
conheca.chegar_carro_desc: BR-101 North to Natal, then RN-221 and RN-021 towards Touros. Gostoso is ~100 km from the capital.
conheca.chegar_onibus_desc: buses depart from Natal (Bus Terminal) to São Miguel do Gostoso. ~2h30 travel time.
conheca.chegar_dica_desc: arriving in Natal, a van transfer is the most comfortable option.
conheca.epoca_vento_desc: August to January — ideal for kite and windsurfing.
conheca.epoca_chuvas_desc: February to July — quieter, lower prices, fewer tourists.
conheca.epoca_reveillon_desc: one of the most famous in Brazil, around 2,500 people per night, 5 to 6 days.
conheca.reveillon_titulo: Réveillon do Gostoso — New Year's Eve
conheca.reveillon_desc: Every year, between December 28 and January 2, Gostoso welcomes visitors from all over Brazil. Live music on the beach, fireworks over the sea, local food at its best. Book your guesthouse early — it sells out since October.
conheca.meta_desc: The history, beaches, how to get there and the best time to visit São Miguel do Gostoso.
